## What this PR does

- [ ] Adds a new resource
- [ ] Removes or fixes a broken resource
- [ ] Updates a description
- [ ] Other

## For new resources

- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Section:**

## Why this is worth adding (one or two sentences)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the format `- [Name](URL) — short, factual description.`
- [ ] Description is factual, not promotional.
- [ ] No em dashes (use comma, colon, or new sentence).
- [ ] "Foreign resident" not "expat" in any description text.
- [ ] Korean terms use English first, Korean in parentheses on first mention (e.g., `community service center (주민센터)`).
- [ ] I'm not affiliated with the resource, or I've disclosed the affiliation.
